summary: Russian forces launched a massive missile and drone strike on Kyiv involving Iskander ballistic missiles, S-400 missiles, Zircons, and over 100 jet-powered drones, complicating air defenses. The attack caused fires and destruction in Kyiv, Zaporozhye, Kharkiv, and Pavlograd, with 7 enemy UAVs shot down in the Leningrad region and 25 in the Rostov region. Ukrainian prosecutors allege that Sergei Kuznetsov acted on Ukrainian state orders in the Nord Stream pipeline sabotage, while Russia proposed unified childcare compensation nationwide.
key_points: Russian forces launched a massive strike on Kyiv using Iskander ballistic missiles, S-400 missiles, Zircons, and over 100 jet-powered drones, complicating air defenses (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
The attack caused fires and destruction in Kyiv, Zaporozhye, Kharkiv, and Pavlograd, with reports of casualties and infrastructure damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian Red Cross warehouse in Kyiv, losing 320,000 units of humanitarian aid valued over 79 million hryvnias (Source: @UkraineNow/82349).
German prosecutors accuse Ukrainian citizen Sergei Kuznetsov of acting on Ukrainian state orders in the Nord Stream pipeline sabotage (Source: @UkraineNow/82346).
Russian embassy in Sweden reported drone attacks with red paint and explosive device replicas, described as 'systematic' by Russian officials (Source: @UkraineNow/82340).
Russian forces struck Zaporozhzhia, causing fires in a multi-story building and a fitness center, with four injured (Source: @UkraineNow/82350).
Ukrainian forces repelled an AFU counterattack using armored vehicles on the Kupyansk direction, with footage showing Russian assault groups deepening into urban areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).

Russian forces launched a massive strike on Ukrainian military-industrial facilities involved in long-range missile and UAV production (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31335).
Russian forces struck Zaporozhzhia, causing fires in a multi-story building and a fitness center, with four injured (Source: @UkraineNow/82350).
Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian Red Cross warehouse in Kyiv, losing 320,000 units of humanitarian aid valued over 79 million hryvnias (Source: @UkraineNow/82349).
Fighting continued for Krasny Liman and its surroundings, with Russian forces occupying houses in the area (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Fighting in the northern part of Konstantinovka continued unabated, with Russian forces conducting heavy offensive battles (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Fighting was ongoing on the eastern outskirts of Dobropollye, with Russian forces attempting to contain Ukrainian forces for defensive fortification (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
On the Kharkiv direction, assault units continued offensive operations in Kazachaya Lopan and adjacent forest areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
In the Sumy direction, small-arms battles continued in Pisarevka, Marino, Novaya Sech, and Khoten (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
On the Kupyansk direction, Ukrainian forces repelled an AFU counterattack using armored vehicles (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Footage from Kupyansk-Uzlovogo showed Russian small assault groups deepening into urban areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
In the Belgorod region, a drone struck a private house in Malakeyevo, killing a man and wounding his wife (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
In Borisovka, a man and a woman sustained shrapnel wounds from an FPV drone detonation (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
In Rylsk, Kursk region, six people were wounded after AFU strikes, with an OMON explosives technician killed during defusal attempts (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Russian forces struck Zaporozhzhia, causing fires in a multi-story building and a fitness center, with four injured (Source: @UkraineNow/82350).
Russian forces launched a massive strike on Ukrainian military-industrial facilities involved in long-range missile and UAV production (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31335).
In the Kherson direction, a drone struck from the southwest, targeting the city (Source: @kpszsu/67133).
On the Kupyansk direction, Ukrainian forces repelled an AFU counterattack using armored vehicles (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Fighting continued for Krasny Liman and its surroundings, with Russian forces occupying houses in the area (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Russian forces launched a massive strike on Kyiv using Iskander ballistic missiles, S-400 missiles, Zircons, and over 100 jet-powered drones (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Over 100 jet-powered drones were fired at Kyiv, complicating air defense operations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
7 enemy UAVs were shot down in the Leningrad region overnight (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Another 5 UAVs were shot down on approach to Moscow (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
More than 25 drones were shot down in the Rostov region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).

The attack caused fires and destruction in Kyiv, Zaporozhzhia, Kharkiv, and Pavlograd, with reports of casualties and infrastructure damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313).
Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian Red Cross warehouse in Kyiv, losing 320,000 units of humanitarian aid valued over 79 million hryvnias (Source: @UkraineNow/82349).
German prosecutors accuse Ukrainian citizen Sergei Kuznetsov of acting on Ukrainian state orders in the Nord Stream pipeline sabotage (Source: @UkraineNow/82346).
Russian embassy in Sweden reported drone attacks with red paint and explosive device replicas, described as 'systematic' by Russian officials (Source: @UkraineNow/82340).
Russian forces struck Zaporozhzhia, causing fires in a multi-story building and a fitness center, with four injured (Source: @UkraineNow/82350).

sections.threat_assessment: The use of jet-powered drones and advanced missile systems in Kyiv indicates a significant escalation in Russian offensive capabilities, challenging Ukrainian air defenses. The destruction of the Red Cross warehouse in Kyiv represents a severe humanitarian threat, undermining civilian infrastructure and aid distribution. The Nord Stream sabotage case, with German charges against a Ukrainian national, suggests potential international legal ramifications and geopolitical tensions. Russian attacks on Ukrainian military-industrial facilities could disrupt production of long-range missiles and UAVs, impacting Ukraine's strategic capabilities. The systematic drone attacks on the Russian embassy in Sweden highlight hybrid warfare tactics aimed at destabilizing Western support for Ukraine.
sections.regional_response: Slovakia announced it will not provide military aid to Ukraine, with Prime Minister Robert Fico stating the country will not participate in any military assistance (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31329). The European Union plans to grant Armenia autonomous trade preferences similar to those applied to Ukraine, as announced by European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31341). Sweden's Foreign Ministry reported systematic drone attacks on the Russian embassy, prompting diplomatic complaints (Source: @UkraineNow/82340). Russia submitted a note to the Swedish Foreign Ministry regarding the embassy incidents (Source: @tass_agency/383411). The EU's response to Armenia's trade preferences reflects ongoing support for Ukraine's economic resilience.
sections.intelligence_notes: The mobilization process in Ukraine appears to prioritize quantitative metrics over medical fitness, leading to the deployment of individuals with severe health conditions, as evidenced by the death of a mobilized man in a Lviv medical facility (Source: @UkraineNow/82325). Russian domestic policies include proposals for unified childcare compensation, addressing regional disparities in support payments (Source: @tass_agency/383400). The destruction of the Red Cross warehouse in Kyiv highlights vulnerabilities in humanitarian logistics, potentially affecting aid delivery to conflict zones (Source: @UkraineNow/82349). The use of jet-powered drones in Kyiv suggests advanced Russian drone technology deployment, complicating Ukrainian air defense strategies (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31313). The systematic drone attacks on the Russian embassy in Sweden indicate a hybrid warfare strategy aimed at undermining Western diplomatic immunity and support for Ukraine (Source: @UkraineNow/82340).
